title: CrystalCoreX
description: CrystalCoreX is a mod-Pack Made with the purpose of creating the best Crystal-PvP Experience possible.
body:
CrystalCore is a high-performance Minecraft modpack maid mostly for Crystal PvP. It focuses on maximizing visibility, reducing distractions, and delivering consistent performance.

This modpack removes unnecessary graphical clutter for the best PvP visuals. Key items like end crystals, obsidian, and armor are rendered with simplified textures to make them easier to identify during fights. This gives players faster reaction times and better placement precision.

CrystalCore also includes optimizations that improve FPS across the board, making it suitable for both high-end and lower-end systems. Whether you're on a competitive server or a chaotic anarchy world, the pack helps ensure your performance never holds you back.

While intentionally minimal in its additions, the pack is fully compatible with most PvP clients and performance mods. It integrates cleanly with setups that includes Fabric and Sodium as well as other optimization tools without adding unnecessary modifications to the game.
